name: Snowy Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 10 each russet potatoes, peeled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender. Drain and return pan to low heat, shaking to dry potatoes.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, cream together cheese, sour cream.
3. Add hot potatoes one at a time to cream mixture and continue beating at high speed until light and fluffy.
4. On low speed, add minced scallions, celery, green pepper, parsley, 1/4 cup melted butter, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Spoon into a 2 1/2 to 3 quart baking dish. Sprinkle with paprika and dot with 2 tablespoons butter.
6. Bake in a preheated 375 degree oven for 25 minutes or until heated through and top is golden brown.
